intent: Write a 3-source research brief on 'essential oil and aromatherapy products — hype or help?'. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the beauty-personal-care and health-household categories and collect at least 4 aromatherapy or diffuser products. Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/science AND /f/TwoXChromosomes for posts on evidence or skepticism regarding aromatherapy, essential oil safety, or pet/child risks. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open 'Aromatherapy' and 'Essential oil' articles and extract 3-4 facts on mechanisms and safety. The report must: (a) present storefront picks with stats, (b) evaluate each claim the products imply against Wikipedia, (c) integrate community safety warnings, (d) close with a skeptics-but-fair verdict. Cite every claim.
